name: Salicylic Acid
description: Salicylic acid (BHA) is an oil-soluble beta hydroxy acid that penetrates deep into pores to dissolve sebum and dead skin cell buildup. It is the go-to chemical exfoliant for acne-prone and oily skin types, reducing blackheads, whiteheads, and inflammation without over-stripping the skin surface.

relatedProducts.name: COSRX Low pH Good Morning Gel Cleanser
